metadata.description: 8th-Layer.ai — Layer 8 of the OSI model. The Semantic Knowledge Layer for agent fleets. Federated marketplace catalog.

plugins.name: 8l-cq
plugins.description: 8th-Layer.ai agent — fork of Mozilla.AI's cq plugin with enterprise execution capabilities (AIGRP client-side routing, DID-KMS bridge, multi-tenancy hooks). Speaks the cq protocol natively; pair with an 8th-Layer.ai tenant Remote for the enterprise feature set.
